title: French Mulukhiyah Salad
description: A French twist on the Middle Eastern mulukhiyah salad, featuring a tangy and refreshing blend of greens.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the mulukhiyah and salad.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil, sour citrus vinaigrette, salt, and pepper.
3. Pour the dressing over the mulukhiyah mixture and toss to combine.
4. Crumble the gooey cheese over the top and toss again.
6. Garnish with additional gooey cheese and sour citrus vinaigrette, if desired.
